scripts.build: terser js/game.js -o dist/game.min.js -c -m && cp index.html dist/ && sed -i 's|js/game.js|game.min.js|g' dist/index.html
scripts.build:all: mkdir -p dist && cp -r assets css Koz_Engine_Lib manifest.json sw.js js/achievements.js js/achievementManager.js js/touchControls.js js/gamepadControls.js js/ui dist/ && npm run build
